event.description:
RSVP TO THIS LINK:

https://www.meetup.com/graphs/events/237100744/

Networking : 6:30-7:00pm

We'll discuss the new Linux Foundation project JanusGraph, (http://janusgraph.org/)and where contributors can focus their attention

There will be a collection of speakers talking about their specialist graph topics including:

• Jason Plurad (https://www.linkedin.com/in/pluradj/), software engineer, will discuss IBM's journey in open source graphs and how its Open by Design approach has benefited open communities and IBM offerings.

• Haikal Pribaldi (https://www.linkedin.com/in/haikalpribadi/) Founder and CEO of GRAKN.A will share how graph tech is used in GRAKN

• Santosh Borse (https://www.linkedin.com/in/santoshborse/), software engineer at IBM, will discuss the creation of an enterprise social graph, how the graph was modeled in IBM, the overall setup, and use of gremlin

• Misha Brukman (https://github.com/mbrukman), at Google, will share ideas around the use of graph with BigTable

• Raymond Canzanese Jr (https://www.linkedin.com/in/raymond-canzanese-jr-178a846/), CTO at Sift Security, will describe their use of graph technologies

• Denise Gosnell (https://www.linkedin.com/in/denisekgosnell/)

, Senior Technical Evangelist, will describe her experience of graph and Titan in PokitDok

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: JanusGraph NYC Meetup
